quiz.title: Idioms & Phrases - SSC Selection Post XIII 2025

questions.question: What does the idiom "**Barking up the wrong tree**" mean?
questions.explanation: Option A: Blaming the wrong person fits the requirement of the question. Option B: Finding the right solution does not best fit the requirement of the question. Option C: Avoiding confrontation does not best fit the requirement of the question. Option D: Taking unnecessary risks does not best fit the requirement of the question. **Option A** correctly applies: it is the best meaning or usage of the idiom/phrase.
